# Vendored: bash-preexec

- **Upstream:** https://github.com/rcaloras/bash-preexec  
- **File:** `bash-preexec.sh` (version noted in the file header, e.g. V0.6.0)  
- **License:** See upstream repository (typically MIT)

Shipped in-repo so runtime does not need network access. To refresh, replace with a new upstream release and review its changelog.
